acceptance_criteria: Quote-to-order conversion ownership reclassification: existing conversion mutations are adjacent-owned, sheet-native surface consumes their output without a parallel mutation path.

decision.summary: Conversion mutations (createDraftFromQuote, route hydration) are adjacent-owned. The sheet-native surface receives and renders the hydrated result via the existing OrderCreatorPage route parsing and data mapping. No parallel mutation path, save-state path, or ownership ambiguity exists.
rationale: OrderCreatorPage.tsx:379-385 parses quoteIdFromRoute and isDuplicateRoute from URL params.
OrderCreatorPage.tsx:639-682 hydrates draft/quote data into editor state including line items, client, and adjustment.
OrderCreatorPage.tsx:422-436 builds document/queue routes conditionally for sheet-native vs classic mode.
The conversion mutation itself (SalesWorkspacePage redirect → tRPC orders.createDraftFromQuote) is unchanged — sheet-native does not add a parallel mutation.
No ownership ambiguity: the mutation lives in the existing orders router, the sheet-native surface just renders the result.

assertions.label: Quote-to-order route parsing and hydration work in sheet-native mode
assertions.expected: OrderCreatorPage parses quoteIdFromRoute, loads quote data, and hydrates editor state regardless of surface variant.
assertions.observed: OrderCreatorPage.tsx:379-385 parses route params. Lines 639-682 hydrate data with setClientId, setItems, setActiveDraftId. Lines 422-436 build routes conditionally. The hydration path is surface-agnostic.

assertions.label: Sheet-native does not add a parallel conversion mutation path
assertions.expected: The existing createDraftFromQuote mutation is the only conversion path. Sheet-native does not duplicate or override it.
assertions.observed: OrderCreatorPage contains no conversion mutation of its own. It receives hydrated data from the existing tRPC router. OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid renders the result through PowersheetGrid.

assertions.label: Conversion ownership reclassified as adjacent-owned per project owner decision
assertions.expected: Project owner confirms conversion mutations are adjacent-owned and sheet-native consumes their output.
assertions.observed: Decision made 2026-03-20: existing conversion mutations are sufficient, no sheet-native-specific conversion path needed.

SALE-ORD-012.evidence: Quote duplication route parsing, hydration, and conditional route building all work in sheet-native mode. No parallel mutation path exists.
SALE-ORD-012.residual: Live quote-to-order flow requires staging proof for live-proven promotion.

SALE-ORD-028.evidence: Conversion ownership reclassified as adjacent-owned per project owner decision. Existing mutations are consumed by sheet-native without duplication.
SALE-ORD-028.residual: None — ownership decision closes this row.
